# DATPAQ IP Intelligence API Sample

This repository contains a production-ready single-page application demonstrating the DATPAQ IP Intelligence API.

## Primary resources
- Human docs: https://datpaq.com/api/v1/ip-intelligence
- API base URL: https://datpaq.com/api
- API route used by this sample: /v1/ip-intelligence
- OpenAI metadata (machine-readable): /openai.json

## What this app demonstrates
- Single-IP intelligence lookup via query parameter.
- Required request validation for API key and IP address.
- Loading, error, empty, and success state rendering.
- Threat/risk signal rendering (malicious flag, threat score, trust score, VPN/Tor/proxy indicators).
- Copyable request URL and JSON response output.

## Auth expectations
- Requires an API key in the `x-api-key` request header.

## Request contract (GET /v1/ip-intelligence)
- Required query parameter: `ip`

## Output contract
- Typical successful response fields include:
  - `data.ip`
  - `data.network`
  - `data.country`
  - `data.region`
  - `data.city`
  - `data.asn`
  - `data.org`
  - `data.threat_intelligence.is_malicious`
  - `data.threat_intelligence.threat_score`
  - `data.threat_intelligence.is_vpn`
  - `data.threat_intelligence.is_tor`
